Enjoy instant 99C hot and 5C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180 flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficientsmarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 234
programme.desc: 14-in-1 La Gourmet pressure cooker that cooks food quickly using steam pressure La Gourmet glass air fryer cooks food by circulating hot air to produce crispy and healthier meals.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S8 - EP 19
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Tasty Taiwan 100 - EP 6
programme.desc: This program specializes in recommending gourmet restaurants from every corners of Taiwan, bringing Taiwan cuisine to more people, as well as the moving stories behind the restaurants.

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 54
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Love Destiny S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Pudan seeks Jialajie for help when she cannot find a sanitary pad. Madam Zhangba hints to Pudan not to think of marrying Li'en and even asks Jialajie to have Dete introduce a potential partner to Pudan.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 7
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Taijing swallows his pride and apologises to his grandmother for his mother's sake, but she remains adamant that he marries Shizhen. In response, Taijing proposes a sham marriage with Shizhen.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 8
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Jiang A-Feng and her son, Dongxu, plan to confront Junhe and demand answers. Unable to stop them, Liandou seeks help from Taijing, who happens to be staying at the same hotel.

programme.title: The Land of Spirits - EP 1
programme.desc: Legend has it that when the first ray of sunlight touched Mount Kailash, the first yak was born. When early Tibetans struggled to survive on the plateau, the mountain god divided wild yaks into two groups: one descended to help humans, becoming domesticated yaks, while the others remained in the mountains as wild yaks. Over generations, domestic yaks grew weaker and less resistant to disease, and herders now seek to strengthen their genes.

programme.title: Feud - EP 9
programme.desc: Li Qingyue makes bold moves to help Bai Jiusi against a rising threat.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 332
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: MISTER BAKPAO VS MISS SINGKONG
programme.desc: Acan (Dimaz Andrean) accidentally damaged Ajeng's (Yunita Siregar) bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. However, before everything was sold, Ajeng left Acan's cart, and a child ate Acan's bakpao without paying. Angry, Acan left Ajeng and took his cart with him. When Ajeng arrived home, Beno (Edwin Syarief), who was to be her match, was already there.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 113
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Susah Banget Dah Memadamkan Api Cinta
programme.desc: Bimo (Ridho Ilahi) is a chef and restaurant owner who was saved by Luna (Shanice Margaretha) due to a fire. Bimo has just broken up with Indah because he is too focused on thinking about his restaurant. Bimo also tries to get close to Luna, the firefighter who saved his life.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 567
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 61
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Geprek Aja Terus Cintaku Sampe Ke Penghulu
programme.desc: Ojan (Masaji Wijayanto) was tricked by a thug so that Ojan had to pay for 3 servings of Nadia's (Larasati Nugroho) chicken geprek. Ojan's debt is because Nadia asked him to fix her motorcycle which suddenly broke down. From Nadia's conversation with her father, it turns out that Ojan also found out that the boyfriend Ojan wanted to meet was having an affair with Nadia's boyfriend.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 62
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih (Carmela van der Kruk) always knows how to handle the horses at Burhan's (Dimas Jati) ranch, Sandra's (Indah Nic) father. Bimo (Naufal Samudra) comes to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which is riding and caring for horses. As soon as he gets on the horse, Bimo falls off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn had nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 114
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) doesn't accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea was told by someone that Bryan's travel business was a fraud. Because of Dhea, Bryan lost money and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work in Bryan's travel business for 2 weeks.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 568
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 62
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISTER BAKPAO VS MISS SINGKONG
programme.desc: Acan (Dimaz Andrean) accidentally damaged Ajeng's (Yunita Siregar) bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. However, before everything was sold, Ajeng left Acan's cart, and a child ate Acan's bakpao without paying. Angry, Acan left Ajeng and took his cart with him. When Ajeng arrived home, Beno (Edwin Syarief), who was to be her match, was already there.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 114
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Susah Banget Dah Memadamkan Api Cinta
programme.desc: Bimo (Ridho Ilahi) is a chef and restaurant owner who was saved by Luna (Shanice Margaretha) due to a fire. Bimo has just broken up with Indah because he is too focused on thinking about his restaurant. Bimo also tries to get close to Luna, the firefighter who saved his life.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 568
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MY BEAUTIFUL (EX) SISTER
programme.desc: Juna (Rizky Alatas) and his brother and father (Tenno Ali) were involved in an accident that killed Juna's brother. At the time, it was supposed to be his brother's happy day as he planned to propose to Karin (Kharisma Adzana). Upon hearing the news of her boyfriend's death, Karin was deeply saddened. She seemed to have lost all will to live. The father, who had already considered Karin as his own daughter, asked Juna to take his brother's place and marry Karin.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 63
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: KETIKA SELAMET JADI TAJIR
programme.desc: No one believes that something that happens to us can actually be a blessing. That's what happened to Selamet (Dimas Aditya), a cleaning man at the office who was promoted to become a trusted aide to Rendra (Denny Martin), the boss.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 115
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Saya Kan Cuma Ikan, Mana Saya Tau Isi Hatimu
programme.desc: Adit (Ridwan Ghany) is a spoiled child who always depends on his father's money. One day his father goes bankrupt and wants to open a catfish restaurant with his friend. However, because Adit doesn't like catfish, Nuri (Syahnaz Sadiqah) and Babe Rojak have to be extra patient in teaching Adit catfish cultivation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 569
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 49
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan & sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia.

programme.title: Stand Up Comedy Otai - EP 5
programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends - EP 6
programme.desc: Bocey & Friends, rancangan sitcom yang di bintangi oleh Achey, Fad, Abam, Zulin dan artis jemputan.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 2
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 14
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah - EP 37
programme.desc: Jannah semakin rimas dengan Zakri yang sentiasa cuba mencari peluang untuk berjumpa dengannya. Syawal terpaksa berdepan dengan sikap Munirah yang semakin biadap dengan Puan Sri Rafidah yang sakit.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 2
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 14

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva fights to reclaim her place in the wealthy Cortes family while searching for the truth about her identity. Fate brings her together with Inno, and their love story endures family secrets, rivalry and tragedy as they discover the real meaning of forgiveness and redemption.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: FPJ's Batang Quiapo
programme.desc: A young man rises to be one of the biggest outlaws in the neighbourhood while he navigates his way in life to survive in Quiapo. Hoping to earn the affection of his parents, his feat draws him closer to the truth about his identity.

programme.desc: Another body is discovered and all eyes turn to the victim's phone, which may contain valuable clues.

programme.desc: International relations analysed using geography maps, which are vital to understanding the world in which we live and the challenges it presents.

programme.title: De Miel Et De Sang
programme.desc: Carel has returned to his native Provence. With his former high school friend, today head of the local police, he investigates the death of a man killed by being stung by dozens of bees. Gradually they uncover a horrific case from the past, one that had shaken the entire village.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 20
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Fontainebleau, the Musee des Peintres de Barbizon traces the history of Impressionism. A self-taught chef turned Michelin-starred chef, Guy Martin looks back on his gastronomic career at the Grand Vefour. Time travel with Chemena Kamali, at the helm of Chloe. The art of straw marquetry with Stephanie Trolez.

programme.title: C'est Du Belge
programme.desc: In the company of Gerald Watelet, focus on the best ambassadors of Belgian culture and heritage, on the behind-the-scenes of unmissable events and portraits of personalities making the news.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: L'auberge Espagnole - EP 1
programme.desc: From Catalonia to Andalusia, accompanied by Martin Steenhaut, wildlife photographer and guide, specialist in hide installation, Tanguy Dumortier observed Spanish wildlife. Encounters with the vulture, the bearded vulture, the genet, the common crane and, of course, the charming Iberian lynx.

programme.title: C'est Succulent ! - EP 15
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Laurence Grimonprez, an antique dealer and chef of Guadeloupean and Northern French origin, to her kitchen. She concocts a recipe for fricadelle, the flagship product of the North, accompanied by a samurai sauce with West Indian chilli and sweet potato pickles.

programme.desc: On the outskirts of Fontainebleau, the Musee des Peintres de Barbizon traces the history of Impressionism. programme.desc: Don Jose is jealous and very rigid. Carmen is seductive and very free. A combination that's not always easy to live with, especially when temptation is everywhere.

programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: C'est Succulent ! - EP 15
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Laurence Grimonprez, an antique dealer and chef of Guadeloupean and Northern French origin, to her kitchen. She concocts a recipe for fricadelle, the flagship product of the North, accompanied by a samurai sauce with West Indian chilli and sweet potato pickles.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: L'auberge Espagnole - EP 1
programme.desc: From Catalonia to Andalusia, accompanied by Martin Steenhaut, wildlife photographer and guide, specialist in hide installation, Tanguy Dumortier observed Spanish wildlife. Encounters with the vulture, the bearded vulture, the genet, the common crane and, of course, the charming Iberian lynx.

programme.title: C'est Du Belge
programme.desc: In the company of Gerald Watelet, focus on the best ambassadors of Belgian culture and heritage, on the behind-the-scenes of unmissable events and portraits of personalities making the news.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 10
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 21

programme.desc: Olive, Petole, Boulard, Mixo, Raoul and Pamela make up a full-of-fun gang known as the Quiquoi. Together they ask a host of existential questions, using drawings to find the answers. programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 23
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 24

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Thalassa, Aventures Extremes - EP 3
programme.desc: Australians, passionate about the sea, must coexist with powerful currents and dangerous animals. Among them, great white sharks are responsible for deadly attacks every year. To better understand and protect them, the government calls on global experts.

programme.title: Thalassa, Aventures Extremes - EP 4
programme.desc: Between Peru and Ecuador lies one of the richest marine biodiversities in the world. While the Galapagos Islands are iconic, there is a lesser-known sanctuary off the coast of Guayaquil in Ecuador, nicknamed the ''Little Galapagos.''

programme.title: Le Dessous Des Cartes - EP 16
programme.desc: International relations analysed using geography maps, which are vital to understanding the world in which we live and the challenges it presents.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Peuples Des Sommets - EP 3
programme.desc: Guillaume sets off to meet the inhabitants of Mala Crna Gora, a tiny village perched in the Durmitor mountains in the heart of Montenegro. Isolated from the rest of the world, the villagers there perpetuate an ancestral way of life, punctuated by the seasons, manual labour, and the bond with the land.

programme.title: Bijoux : Eclats De Reves - EP 2
programme.desc: How do you design a piece of jewellery? Hear from creators, artisans and artistic directors from major houses.

programme.title: OPJ - EP 11
programme.desc: The body of Helene Bertillon, director of a water sports base, is found in the Saint-Paul pond nature reserve. As the investigation is conducted jointly by the police and the gendarmerie, tensions rise quickly.

programme.title: OPJ - EP 12
programme.desc: Another body is discovered and all eyes turn to the victim's phone, which may contain valuable clues.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 1
programme.desc: Christel Sadde creates moving sculptures. A trained graphic designer inspired by geometric abstraction and kinetic art, she has been exploring for over twenty years the poetic and aerial lightness of form.

programme.title: Movie - Paayum Puli (New)
programme.desc: When an extortion gang spreads terror in Madurai, ACP Jayasheelan is assigned to bring an end to their wrongdoing. However, he is unaware that the mastermind of the crimes is someone close to him.

programme.title: Movie - Vaada
programme.desc: A man goes after a person who has wronged him and spoilt his life. His wife, who is an ardent fan of the film actor MGR, encourages her husband to take inspiration from the reel-life hero.

programme.title: Movie - Vavval Pasanga
programme.desc: A youngster is compelled to choose an unfavourable path because of societal pressure.

programme.title: Movie - Vegam
programme.desc: Sidharth and Daveed decide to get rich at any cost, hoping to lead a luxurious life, but they get into some unperceived danger and struggle to set things right.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Sivasakthi
programme.desc: Sakthi, a police officer, befriends Siva, a smuggler, in order to gain his trust and get evidence against him. But soon, their friendship turns into a genuine one.

programme.title: Movie - Sattam Oru Iruttu Arai
programme.desc: Siblings Vijay and Sheela are in pursuit of the men who killed their father and sister. While Sheela wants to punish them in the court of law, Vijay takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Movie - Enaintha Kaikal
programme.desc: At the request of a desperate mother, an ex-army man sets out to rescue her son who is being held in a military prison. Another man is on a mission to kidnap that prisoner and kill the ex-army man.

programme.title: Movie - Solla Marandha Kadhai
programme.desc: Sivadhanu, an educated but unemployed honest man, gets married to the daughter of a rich man and moves to their house. However, taunts and disrespect compel him to find a new job in another town.

programme.title: Movie - Citizen
programme.desc: Abdulla, a mechanic, kidnaps three prominent government officials. Sarojini is a CBI officer who investigates this matter and tries to piece together the clues left behind by the kidnapper.

programme.title: Movie - Vanayutham
programme.desc: The infamous forest brigand Veerappan smuggles sandalwood and ivory, kills elephants, and murders innocent people incessantly. Finally, the police set up a task force to catch him and his gang.

programme.title: Movie - Veluthukattu
programme.desc: Kathir decides to change his wayward lifestyle to marry Arukkani and moves to the city. He returns home as a successful restaurant owner but tragedy strikes in Arukkani's life.

programme.title: Movie - Vinayaka
programme.desc: Karthik, a cheerful man, starts working for a new company in Hyderabad. There, he falls in love with Kalpana. Unfortunately, Kalpana doesn't feel the same for him.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Aacharya
programme.desc: When he arrives in the city to earn a living, Yadhunandhan is helped by Mayakka, a gangster, who also gives him a place to live. When she is killed by a rival gang, Yadhunandhan decides to avenge her death.

programme.title: Movie - Arpudham
programme.desc: Ashok is a careless man with no respect for hard work. He falls for Priya who rejects him. When he threatens to kill himself, she reminds him that he's a nobody. He decides to make a mark for himself.

programme.title: Movie - Thangamaana Rasa
programme.desc: Chinnakaruppan goes to jail after accidentally killing his brother for cheating him. His son Rasa tries to make peace with his cousin who holds vengeance against his family for killing his father.

programme.title: Movie - Maraivaasi
programme.desc: A billionaire's son returns after his father's death and joins the company as a regular employee in order to nab the people responsible for his father's murder.

programme.desc: Parimalam, a mischievous girl, falls in love with a widower who works as a teacher. She marries him by falsely accusing him of molesting her, but she has to take a drastic step to win his heart.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 1
programme.desc: Once the unsung workhorses of English football, centre-backs have become some of the Premier League's most influential figures. This week, The Art of... sits down with two-time Premier League winner Joleon Lescott to explore how the role has evolved from last-ditch defending to a position that now shapes games, systems and titles. Joleon breaks down some of the key attributes of the role, and examines how the duties of the centre-back have expanded over time.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 1
programme.desc: Once the unsung workhorses of English football, centre-backs have become some of the Premier League's most influential figures. This week, The Art of... sits down with two-time Premier League winner Joleon Lescott to explore how the role has evolved from last-ditch defending to a position that now shapes games, systems and titles. Joleon breaks down some of the key attributes of the role, and examines how the duties of the centre-back have expanded over time.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 20
programme.desc: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. Shaun Wright-Phillips and Joleon Lescott offer the perspective from both sides, with the final day drama at the Etihad set in the context of Manchester City's Run-In and their pursuit of a first Premier League Title.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 13
programme.desc: From the depths of League One to becoming a Premier League and European champion, Adam Lallana emerged as one of English football's standout talents of the 2010s. The midfielder recalls his most memorable matches for Southampton and Liverpool.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 28
programme.desc: At just 22 years old, Xavi Simons has already experienced more than most do in an entire career. Identified as a generational talent from an early age, Simons graduated from La Masia before moving to PSG, where he played alongside his childhood hero, Neymar. Following spells at PSV and RB Leipzig after his time in the French capital, Simons made the move to Tottenham Hotspur and the Premier League this summer.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 38
programme.desc: With exclusive access in Germany, PL Stories follows the remarkable journey of Shinji Okazaki; from his beginnings in Japanese football to becoming a Premier League champion with Leicester City and now shaping the next generation through his club Basara Mainz.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 22
programme.desc: We tell the story of a commanding centre-back whose leadership and consistency made him a standout figure in both the Premier League and international football. From his early career in Portugal to his influential spell at Southampton, PL Stories explores how Fonte became a rock in the heart of defence during the club's rise in the top-flight.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 1
programme.desc: Once the unsung workhorses of English football, centre-backs have become some of the Premier League's most influential figures. This week, The Art of... sits down with two-time Premier League winner Joleon Lescott to explore how the role has evolved from last-ditch defending to a position that now shapes games, systems and titles. Joleon breaks down some of the key attributes of the role, and examines how the duties of the centre-back have expanded over time.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 28
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 24 FEB
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 28
programme.desc: At just 22 years old, Xavi Simons has already experienced more than most do in an entire career. Identified as a generational talent from an early age, Simons graduated from La Masia before moving to PSG, where he played alongside his childhood hero, Neymar. Following spells at PSV and RB Leipzig after his time in the French capital, Simons made the move to Tottenham Hotspur and the Premier League this summer.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 27
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 23 FEB
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 2
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 28
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.desc: From the depths of League One to becoming a Premier League and European champion, Adam Lallana emerged as one of English football's standout talents of the 2010s. The midfielder recalls his most memorable matches for Southampton and Liverpool.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 11
programme.desc: When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition. Explore the rich legacy of Liverpool's managerial transitions, where through decades of change, one constant endures: the club's remarkable ability to evolve and triumph, through seamless succession.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: We sit down with ex-Premier League referee Howard Webb, to talk about his early days as a South Yorkshire policeman to becoming one of the most respected referees in world football. In this candid interview Webb shares stories of his rise through the Premier League ranks, culminating in the honour of refereeing the 2010 FIFA World Cup Final. Along the way, he shares the challenges, pressures, and defining moments of a career spent making the game's toughest calls on the biggest stages.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 4
programme.desc: Marcelo Bielsa brought Premier League football back to Leeds in 2020, following a 16 year exile from the top flight. Amidst the backdrop of a global pandemic, Bielsa's full-throttle tactics made Leeds the story of the season. Stuart Dallas recalls the highlights.

programme.title: FS MMA Anthony Ruiz vs. Bobby Southworth
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Bobby Southworth faces Anthony "A-Train" Ruiz in this light heavyweight championship bout that goes the distance in a 5 round war from San Jose, CA, USA.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Shane Mosley vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights 'Sugar' Shane Mosley (43-4, 37 KOs) and Luis Collazo (27-2, 13 KOs) fighting over the interim WBC title. This fight took place at the Mandalay Bay Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA, on February 10, 2007.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Floyd Mayweather, Jr. vs. Shane Mosley
programme.desc: This episode features Floyd Mayweather, Jr. taking on Shane Mosley in a welterweight title bout, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Adrien Broner vs. Martin Rodriguez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-undefeated Adrien Broner facing Martin Rodriguez for the vacant WBO super featherweight title. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champions Paul Williams and Kermit Cintron.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Chiyotairyu, Myogiryu, Goeido and Tamawashi from the Haru basho, 2019.

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.desc: Episode 3: Tokyo, Japan - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kyokushin Karate and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Breaking featuring Masters Shihan Yuzo Goda and Shihan Isamu Fukuda.

programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-unbeaten Saul "Canelo" Alvarez in what might yet be his toughest challenge in his career, as he defends the WBC light middleweight championship against "Sugar" Shane Mosley. programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features two-time UFC champion and Hall of Famer Randy "The Natural" Couture and his buddies firing up their motorcycles for a good cause, plus an interview with one of MMA's biggest stars, "Rowdy" Ronda Rousey. We've got another installment of the gun store challenge this time with Thiago Alves, plus we go behind the scenes for a photo shoot with ring girl Arianny Celeste, exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Rizlen Zouak
programme.desc: This episode features a women's banthamweight championship as Amanda 'Mad Dog' Lino and Rizlen 'The Lioness of the Atlas' Zouak fight their way to Fight of the Night honors. Bonus coverage showcases more striking power with Mzawandile Hlongwa vs. Robert Swanepoel and Steve Nwosu vs. Quinton Rossouw. From EFC 70 in Sibaya Casino, Durbin, South Africa on 26-May-2018.

This episode features a WBO welterweight championship bout between 8-time defending champ Antonio Margarito, aka 'El Tornado de Tijuana' (34-4, 24 KOs) and undefeated Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (32-0, 24 KOs) from the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on July 14, 2007.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: In the qualifying round at Universal Orlando Resort, veteran competitors including pro-wake boarder Sean Murray, William "Spartan" Brown, and long-time rivals Flip Rodriguez and Drew Drechsel take on Paddle Boards, the Tire Swing, and other new obstacles as they battle for a chance to compete for a $1,000,000 cash prize.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Floyd Mayweather, Jr. vs. Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Floyd Mayweather, Jr. challenging Miguel Cotto for his WBA super welterweight title in a bout which drew 1.5 million buys. Also on the card, action from former WBC Welterweight champ Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Kakuryu, Aoiyama, Goeido and Abi from the Natsu basho.

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.desc: It's the final day of gator season, and teams are all within striking distance of winning the competition for 350 new tags. Ronnie and Ashley fight to hang onto their lead.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 1
programme.desc: After last year's devastating flood in the garden shaft, Rick, Marty and the fellowship return to Oak Island with renewed confidence and immediately discover a never-before-known shaft.

programme.desc: The team thinks a 300-foot wreck off the tip of Florida just might be the Sudoffco-a steel freighter lost in 1926 with 29 men while travelling through the Triangle from New Jersey to the Panama Canal.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Ancient cultures around the world have aroused fascination and provoked fear with curses and objects used to conjure them, like tablets and stones. But is there proof that some might have actually worked?

programme.desc: A new, subsurface investigation on Skinwalker Ranch leads to a baffling discovery near Homestead Two.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 13
programme.desc: They've been called the world's greatest archaeological enigma. 2,000-year-old geoglyphs made in the Peruvian desert that span over 50 miles. The drawings are so massive, they can be seen from the air.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 14
programme.desc: During WWII, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver, and currency, and stashed them across Europe. While some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 4
programme.desc: Amidst financial troubles, Disney hires an ingenious marketing whiz who helps them figure out how to bring their beloved characters off the screen and into the hands of millions.

programme.title: All Things Durian
programme.desc: Durian season is an annual celebration in Southeast Asia. From the surprising kampung types to the glamorous clones and the mysterious wild species - nothing beats durian!

programme.title: Alone (S10) - EP 11
programme.desc: The three remaining survivalists brace themselves for the fight to the finish. One participant finds it impossible to stay warm, while others risk it all on the ice. Only one can claim the $500,000 prize.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: What lies beneath? David Duchovny takes us into the top-secret government bases and the clandestine operations they were built to conceal. Discover a deadly poison lab, a nuclear missile site and more.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Forget the moon or the stars-every government has even bigger designs in the race to dominate the sky. Uncover a plane crash in North Carolina that almost triggered nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbours confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent who attacks her bus with a hammer.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: A man risks his life to save his wife during a home invasion; two convenience store workers defend their workplace; a hairdresser is put in an unpredictable situation; and more.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 8
programme.desc: When one of Redlands, California's newest residents goes missing, the distraught community bands together to help find her.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: A forensic DNA expert, Dr Maria Corazon de Ungria helps prove a man's innocence and solves a victim's identity using bones.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: Malaysia's top forensic entomologist Dr Nazni Wasi Ahmad shows how insects on a corpse can provide useful clues on the death.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Charming and smart, Henry tried to hide his dark side, fuelled by years of abuse and twisted fantasies, until his first murder. Then, bad Henry took over.

programme.desc: When a Christian ranch hand, Dan Lavigne, 52, is shot dead on his porch in Montana, 2002, deputies find no shortage of suspects.

programme.desc: When an otherwise healthy woman is admitted to the hospital with sudden organ failure, an anonymous tip leads authorities to investigate a pattern of deaths in her family and a shocking prime suspect.

programme.desc: The family of a missing Texas mother becomes concerned when they start receiving suspicious text messages from her phone.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC’s "Worldwide Exchange" delivers essential, actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Morgan Brennan, the program prepares CNBC’s worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action.

programme.desc: "Squawk Box" is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Global Business

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: On Smiles and Stumbles, with Humbert Humbert
programme.desc: The program features an interview with Humbert Humbert, the musical duo behind "Smiles and Stumbles," the theme song of the drama serial "The Ghost Writer's Wife". With Asagaya Shimai and Iwasaki Udai joining the show, it explores why the song has resonated so deeply across generations, drawing on stories shared by viewers and voices from the leading actors. It also uncovers the little‑known story of how the theme song was created through interviews with members of the production team.

programme.title: Today's Cooking
programme.desc: Cooking instructors will show all there is to know for a good hearty cooking.

programme.title: Tanka Poetry
programme.desc: The program introduces various Tanka created by viewers while learning and having fun with engaging guests.

programme.title: Trip to the Origin of Japan
German in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Real-Life Travel English
programme.desc: This program is a practical listening course designed to help you understand fast-paced real English that you encounter when traveling abroad.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery (R)
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Ghost Writer's Wife" Ep. 102 (R)
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: On Smiles and Stumbles, with Humbert Humbert (R)
programme.desc: The program features an interview with Humbert Humbert, the musical duo behind "Smiles and Stumbles," the theme song of the drama serial "The Ghost Writer's Wife". With Asagaya Shimai and Iwasaki Udai joining the show, it explores why the song has resonated so deeply across generations, drawing on stories shared by viewers and voices from the leading actors. It also uncovers the little‑known story of how the theme song was created through interviews with members of the production team.

programme.title: Unaginobori LAB: What Makes People Gather
programme.desc: ‘Unaginobori’ is a Japanese idiom that describes a rapid and powerful upward surge-like an eel shooting upward. This program uses a uniquely developed a map to track places where people are gathering with unaginobori momentum, revealing the mystery behind these sudden population spikes. Where people gather, there lies the key to unlocking the story of our times!

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Deeper Look
programme.desc: What's next for Japan-US innovation? Miura Satoshi, the president of JETRO New York, offers his insights into the future of partnerships.

programme.title: Dig More Japan!
programme.desc: Instead of throwing away things that are old or broken, Japan fixes and reuses them with the culture of 'mottainai' - let's dig a little deeper.

programme.title: Dining with the Chef mini
programme.desc: Traditional techniques and resourceful recipes in just five minutes! Chefs Saito and Rika present their unique approaches to cooking delicious Japanese food.

programme.title: Dining with the Chef
programme.desc: We travel to Rebun - a remote Hokkaido island renowned for its kombu, the seaweed vital for Japanese dashi - to meet a passionate harvester whose kombu is utilised by Chef Kuwakino in superb cuisine.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: This programme gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia, explaining the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: In July 2025, Hayashi Hisashi became the first Japanese winner of a prestigious German award for the best board game of the year - how does he design games that captivate players around the world?

programme.title: One in Every Japanese
programme.desc: In 2023, one in 27 children in Japan was not attending school - a record high - but children at one free school enjoy themselves. Seeing them thrive reminds adults to see matters from a child's view.

programme.title: One in Every Japanese
programme.desc: Oshi-Katsu is the fan support of idols / characters through real and social means - with one in five Japanese adults taking part, we explore how this zealous fandom gives life purpose to one woman.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: A Bedtime Routine: On hot and humid summer nights, nothing can get in the way of sleep like mosquitoes - we learn about the tools Edo townspeople had at their disposal to fight these pesky insects.

programme.title: The Choice of Egg Freezing
programme.desc: To place a greater focus on their careers, many women in Japan are using egg freezing to save pregnancy for later in their lives and accepting the cost and physical strain that treatment entails.

programme.title: Document 72 Hours
programme.desc: Kerosene home delivery is a key lifeline for residents of Sapporo, Hokkaido. For three days in midwinter, we followed trucks delivering this heating oil and spoke to people who rely on this service.

programme.title: Girl Power - EP 650
programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1597
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Earthfocus - EP 55
programme.desc: With the theme of environmental protection, humanitarian care and civilized human life.

programme.title: Dee Girl's Talk - EP 450
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: ShinyFoodDiary - EP 118
programme.desc: The host visits various places in a walking and themed way, focusing on what is most fashionable among young people nowadays.Check in on FB and IG to create new highlights and online clicks, not only delicious food, but also in-depth introduction.Introduce the cultural customs and festivals of various places.

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 32
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. If you want to conquer the Jiugongge level, through creative association, logical reasoning, and rational analysis, you will have the opportunity to obtain wisdom stars and take away the dream prize.

programme.title: Who Wants A Baby? - EP 15
programme.desc: An unexpected pregnancy complicates a couple's life as they grapple with becoming parents.

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous & What's On Today - EP 2
programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2750
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 826
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: I Kill U - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sun Woo, a down-and-out former athlete, is hired to impersonate Ji Yeon, an heiress involved as a driver in a hit-and-run accident. Drawn into dangerous family power struggles, she is trapped between survival and deception.

programme.title: Under the Moonlight - EP 34
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story follows Luo Shu (Hu Bingqing), a young woman trapped in the plight of fate yet determined to save herself, who meets Qi Menglin (Zhai Zilu), a spirited youth eager to roam the martial world. Together, they brave hardships and solve mysteries.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2154
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] By means of Chinese medical methodology, Wai-man prescribes supplements for Yin-cho’s drunkenness and Yee-ting’s stomach issues. Yee-ting covertly fancies Wai-man. Wing-sum quits her real estate agent job. Wai-man asks her to help him with the design of the arcade in the renovation project, and Wing-sum is able to again pursue her interior design dream.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2154
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart - EP 31
programme.desc: While secretly investigating a case, Jiang Xin Bai, a proud prince and head constable who suffers from face blindness, meets the unorthodox Dr Yan Nan Xing, who ‘changes her appearance’ each month. They go from being at odds to solving cases together.

programme.title: Good Job - EP 6
programme.desc: Eun Seon-Woo (Jung Il-Woo) owns the biggest company in Korea and secretly runs a private detective office. Don Se-Ra (Kwon Yuri) was born with hyperacuity and uses it to help people. As the arrogant and the helpful meet to solve cases together, romance blossoms.

programme.title: Big Biz Duel - EP 10
programme.desc: Man-ho persuades board members to side with him as he plots to make Chiu Hoi step down. While votes are cast, some people on Man-ho’s side abruptly stage a revolt. Chiu Hoi does not have to step down. He also forces the opposing directors to sell their shares so as to facilitate privatization of MLC. Directors are not fighting back.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang teams up with the media to smear Herbal Painless. In the program, reporters ask Shuk-foon leading questions, inadvertently sparking public opinion about Herbal Painless plagiarizing Yam Yuen. Wai-man is not affected by gossip. Instead, he plans to launch some new medicated oil.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2155
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart - EP 32
programme.desc: While secretly investigating a case, Jiang Xin Bai, a proud prince and head constable who suffers from face blindness, meets the unorthodox Dr Yan Nan Xing, who ‘changes her appearance’ each month. They go from being at odds to solving cases together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 827
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me - EP 1
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Under the Moonlight - EP 35
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story follows Luo Shu (Hu Bingqing), a young woman trapped in the plight of fate yet determined to save herself, who meets Qi Menglin (Zhai Zilu), a spirited youth eager to roam the martial world. Together, they brave hardships and solve mysteries.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2155
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang teams up with the media to smear Herbal Painless. In the program, reporters ask Shuk-foon leading questions, inadvertently sparking public opinion about Herbal Painless plagiarizing Yam Yuen. Wai-man is not affected by gossip. Instead, he plans to launch some new medicated oil.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. programme.title: Good Job - EP 7
programme.desc: Eun Seon-Woo (Jung Il-Woo) owns the biggest company in Korea and secretly runs a private detective office. Don Se-Ra (Kwon Yuri) was born with hyperacuity and uses it to help people. As the arrogant and the helpful meet to solve cases together, romance blossoms.

programme.title: Under the Moonlight - EP 35
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story follows Luo Shu (Hu Bingqing), a young woman trapped in the plight of fate yet determined to save herself, who meets Qi Menglin (Zhai Zilu), a spirited youth eager to roam the martial world. Together, they brave hardships and solve mysteries.

programme.title: Big Biz Duel - EP 11
programme.desc: Fong Fong sees Man-ho in a different light as Man-ho simply calls someone and resolves the issue of an MLC cold storage container seized by customs. Three logistics big shots invite To-ming to help deal with Chiu Hoi. To-ming declines. To-mingquestions Sung Kiu about the abortion. To-ming is jealous and agrees to some logistics boss’ request to deal with Chiu Hoi.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 828
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.
